Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 87ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
36ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 34ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Scenario:
Validation fails when platform username is empty
14ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 13ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should fail validation < 1ms

Setup:

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 11ms
field value
platform_username invalid_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "invalid_username",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 404,
          "body": {
            "error": {
              "platform_username": "invalid_username"
            },
            "message": "User not found",
            "code": 404,
            "message_code": 14008
          }
        }

Info

            "error": {

Request:

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

        }
    Response:

          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [

                "key": "currencies",
                "message": "\"currencies\" must contain at least 1 items"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Scenario:
Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid
13ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 12ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update 25ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates
So that the merchant can receive wager update events for supported wallet modes

Scenario:
Notify merchant with a single wager update
9ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS notifies wager update with payload: 9ms 

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": (wager_type.normal_wager),
      "status": (wager_status.settled),
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    }
  ]
}
 Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:8082/wager/notify
    Payload:
        {
          "notification_type": "typeA",
          "notifications": [
            {
              "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
              "game_key": "PT_SLOT",
              "wager_no": "wager-1773997225894-76gstb",
              "origin_wager_no": null,
              "ticket_no": "ticket-89675867-6ff7-4c9f-85b8-883ada80c91c",
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "type": 1,
              "status": 2,
              "currency": "CNY",
              "amount": 10.1,
              "payment_amount": 10.1,
              "effective_amount": 10,
              "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
              "wager_time": 1773997225,
              "settlement_time": 1773997225,
              "is_system_reward": false
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": null,
            "message": "Mock success case"
          }
        }

Info

When APISYS notifies wager update with payload: 6ms 

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": "(origin_wager_no)",
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": "(wager_type.normal_wager)",
      "status": "(wager_status.resettled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    },
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_seamless)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_seamless)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": "(wager_type.normal_wager)",
      "status": "(wager_status.settled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 249ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
89ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 16ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

And I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 19ms Show Info +

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

        {

Balance:
    CNY:

Request:

    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

And I prepare a valid amount less than the balance by 10 1ms Show Info + 
Amount to deduct: 90.125:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.125
    extra:
        10

Info 

Amount to deduct: 90.125:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.125
    extra:
        10

When APISYS requests payment with: 32ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount -<deduction_amount>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "5fe5047d-2a79-4cd3-ad0f-b22f3e981559",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-90.125"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "d6b280bd-9efb-4ff9-a6cd-f329108fc0c4",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests payment with: 10ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount 5
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "a970b10f-2302-4b1b-8eca-6156b42bb3ca",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "0d55ea67-c045-4fb4-9156-67b9f12f53c0",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 401ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement increases wallet balance by settlement amount
88ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 16ms Show Info +

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 10
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        10

When APISYS settles a wager with: 45ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
effective_amount 25.75
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "5f6f2bdd-e304-4e2f-b082-388366c48e36",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997226201-55ent5",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "25.75",
          "effective_amount": "25.75",
          "settlement_time": "1773997226",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "6acd3230-9831-43a0-9bb8-f34d623a8341",
            "origin_order_no": "852a9b07-638d-4086-befe-1ca404442185",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "ae88e39f-d8a2-4f1f-ba33-cde95eab0b6e"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "828d6cde-8d25-4a4a-9ec7-5567ee38545c"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 25.75 25ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }

        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 35.75
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        10
    After:
        35.75
    Expected increase:
        25.75

        35.75

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 35.75
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    Currency:

    Before:
        10
    After:

    Expected:

When APISYS settles a wager with: 60ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 10
effective_amount 10
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
partial_settlement_history [{ "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_1>", "amount": 2.5, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }, { "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_2>", "amount": -1, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "67f7e140-45a2-42c4-9840-9eaffdb4ece5",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997226291-yvgg9r",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10",
          "effective_amount": "10",
          "settlement_time": "1773997226",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "a27e57db-d6be-4c80-93b6-a8a569f22222",
            "origin_order_no": "1f93f005-a04e-4f53-bb28-cbaa26ecd6d0",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "30d1e60a-a629-4bc7-ac2d-91808b150576"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false",
          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "d4865352-e5c8-4c7d-ab60-44ed91b22f04",
              "amount": 2.5,
              "settlement_time": 1773997226
            },
            {
              "transaction_no": "baea2f4d-2c1e-4eba-b093-d64db42958ba",
              "amount": -1,
              "settlement_time": 1773997226
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "25a5559f-408b-44bd-8dad-181e78ba136a"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

When APISYS settles a wager with: 12ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
effective_amount 1.1234567
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "609a89a2-a457-4d5c-a8c3-fb75abba4682",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997226596-64foe9",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1773997226",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "728294b5-7e9b-4ab2-9228-ae525af97327",
            "origin_order_no": "f58b947b-ca22-4397-9c17-7b5abcfc922f",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "f4365a23-18c8-40ab-b519-2224ffe3c4f2"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "609a89a2-a457-4d5c-a8c3-fb75abba4682",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997226596-64foe9",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1773997226",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "728294b5-7e9b-4ab2-9228-ae525af97327",
            "origin_order_no": "f58b947b-ca22-4397-9c17-7b5abcfc922f",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "f4365a23-18c8-40ab-b519-2224ffe3c4f2"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO007 response should fail validation < 1ms

Feature:AMO008 Seamless Cancel Wager 17ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel wager API
So that I can refund a previously paid wager

Scenario:
Cancel wager refunds a prepared paid wager
17ms 2 3 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 16ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 22.25
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        22.25

currency <currency>
payment_amount 30

field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
wager_no <wager_no>

  callback(null, 'pending');

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 30 < 1ms

I want to call the merchant resettle wager API
So that I can apply corrected settlement amounts

Resettlement increases the wallet balance

When APISYS resettles a wager with: 33ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
ticket_no <ticket_no>
origin_wager_no <origin_wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 12.5
effective_amount <effective_amount>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
wager_time <wager_time>
settlement_time <settlement_time>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/resettle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "27589f86-c21c-403f-b982-2ad7f9b0077f",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1773997226629-yg2tfm",
          "ticket_no": "ticket-353d38c2-0953-44e8-95a5-fd5395559b04",
          "origin_wager_no": "origin-1773997226629-2ue70m",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "12.5",
          "effective_amount": "",
          "type": "1",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "c8f2050b-a9a6-4e16-8618-d1526834bf57",
            "origin_order_no": "71ce47fb-10ee-461b-9308-ad654e893cb5",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "da2c1b74-1727-43f9-86ac-d21682429869"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "wager_time": "1773997226",
          "settlement_time": "1773997226",
          "is_system_reward": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "3b5a2f53-4d7f-4db5-a7a3-410cdd31827f"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Feature:Wager lifecycle wallet correctness < 1ms 1

Scenario:
Complete wager lifecycle updates wallet correctly
< 1ms 13

Given player wallet balance is 100.00 USD < 1ms 

Then(/^player wallet balance is 100.00 USD$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When a wager request is made with payment_amount 10.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^a wager request is made with payment_amount 10.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then wallet balance should decrease by exactly 10.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should decrease by exactly 10.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And wallet balance should be 90.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should be 90.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When settlement amount is 15.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^settlement amount is 15.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then wallet balance should increase by exactly 15.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should increase by exactly 15.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And wallet balance should be 105.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should be 105.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When resettle amount is 10.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^resettle amount is 10.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then wallet balance should decrease by exactly 5.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should decrease by exactly 5.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And wallet balance should be 100.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should be 100.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When undo wager request is made < 1ms 

Then(/^undo wager request is made$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then wallet balance should increase by exactly 10.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should increase by exactly 10.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And wallet balance should be 110.00 < 1ms 

Then(/^wallet balance should be 110.00$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the member wallet has balances: < 1ms
currency balance
<currency> 100 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given a bet exists with: < 1ms
wager_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no> 

Then(/^a bet exists with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests payment with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -30

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 70 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 70$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And a request payment transaction exists with: < 1ms
wager_no
order_no <transaction_uuid_1>
currency <currency>
amount -30 

Then(/^a request payment transaction exists with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the request payment transaction payload includes wager: < 1ms
wager_no
payment_amount 30 

Then(/^the request payment transaction payload includes wager:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 100 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 100$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then notify payment failed < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify failed payment refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 40 then notify payment failed restores balance to 90
< 1ms 8 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the member wallet has balances: < 1ms
currency balance
<currency> 90 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given a request payment transaction mapping will be created for parent wager "<parent_wager_no>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a request payment transaction mapping will be created for parent wager "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests payment with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -40

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 50 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 50$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS notifies payment failed with: < 1ms
transaction_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username> 

Then(/^APISYS notifies payment failed with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance for "<platform_username>" in "<currency>" should become 90 < 1ms 

Then(/^the wallet balance for "([^"]*)" in "([^"]*)" should become 90$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Feature:AMO010 Request Transfer In 382ms 8 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer in API
So that I can credit funds into the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer in increases wallet balance
65ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        30.5

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 30.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        30.5

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 33ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 75.125
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "a9e40ebd-88ab-4125-a4b5-05456ff4ff19",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "75.125",
          "session_id": "d65ba372-b2f3-4991-9e14-8c6f345cf31b"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "2247afff-823b-4f44-a9b5-0d4c2ac9ef54",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"

        }

          "status": 200,

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount precision is invalid
12ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 11ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "888f4731-f058-4232-a7c0-7cc2284dfeda",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "825563c1-abac-4d8f-8931-f2a74cdaed1e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "888f4731-f058-4232-a7c0-7cc2284dfeda",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "825563c1-abac-4d8f-8931-f2a74cdaed1e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO010 response should fail validation < 1ms

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount is negative
19ms 3

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 480ms 9 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
85ms 7

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 16ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

And I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 17ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

Info

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,

              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 175.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        175.625

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 36ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "5c2751fd-9f20-49b8-ae80-1931daf78e07",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "ba8a375a-43ae-4eb3-879c-6720506f45ad"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "45f5f6e2-25c7-4ff5-9910-75a384bae7fd",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "5c2751fd-9f20-49b8-ae80-1931daf78e07",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "ba8a375a-43ae-4eb3-879c-6720506f45ad"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "45f5f6e2-25c7-4ff5-9910-75a384bae7fd",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 155.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        175.625
    After:
        155.125
    Expected decrease:
        20.5

        155.125

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 43ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -15
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "f07a2add-071a-41cb-b477-cfea29d01e26",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-15",
          "session_id": "32eccbdd-7c4e-4731-aaa1-187564cc0dbc"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "e9f3d78e-635e-4d33-ab1b-71c3976862eb",
              "amount": -15,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -15
status 1

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 18ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount <amount_exceeding_balance>
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "4e7722e4-3e09-42ad-988f-70747a662c11",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-150.125",
          "session_id": "babd5efe-2baf-4774-a0c6-3b7acc5d641e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "4e7722e4-3e09-42ad-988f-70747a662c11",
              "amount": 0,
              "status": 2
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

session_id <session_id>
Show Info +

    API:

        {
          "transfer_no": "434d41b4-5f7a-4b1d-8515-95cc6899de94",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "2f867ecd-9909-4660-b162-50ec8a4aeeb0"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {

            "data": {

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "434d41b4-5f7a-4b1d-8515-95cc6899de94",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "2f867ecd-9909-4660-b162-50ec8a4aeeb0"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "2b036cfe-a611-4ce0-bb13-3fe7092d338d",
              "amount": -140,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        140.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        140.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount precision is invalid
11ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info +

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 10ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "5d1d3850-e686-4902-b071-1d12d230ddfc",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "8675a164-44d6-4977-b6e9-e91aa59d6815"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 177ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
96ms 9

Given a merchant member exists 4ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: 39ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 20
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "2473abd0-70d1-41fb-b580-4bc2a2be341d",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "b78e50f9-df2d-4f28-9a6d-8ad3f4ee31eb"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "5a89aa4a-6f24-4229-b79d-6ae0fe314dfb",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO014 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <cancel_reference_id>

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer wallet lifecycle 366ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify wallet balance changes and transfer reversal end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in, transfer out, cancel transfer, and idempotent cancel
366ms 21

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        0.125

Request:
    API:

    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "1cfb86dc-bc2b-4441-ab51-9bb8d28245eb"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "af8565f8-3cc4-4af0-9e0e-17562bf87f25"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/cancel-transfer
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "1cfb86dc-bc2b-4441-ab51-9bb8d28245eb"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "af8565f8-3cc4-4af0-9e0e-17562bf87f25"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO014 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "cancel_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    cancel_reference_id:
        af8565f8-3cc4-4af0-9e0e-17562bf87f25

Info 

Stored:
    cancel_reference_id:
        af8565f8-3cc4-4af0-9e0e-17562bf87f25

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 35 29ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        65.125
    After:
        100.125

        35

        100.125

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,

              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
